# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Commands

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      runs-on:
        description: Runner label (e.g., ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest)
        required: false
        default: ubuntu-latest
        type: string
      shell:
        description: Shell to use for running commands (bash, pwsh, sh, cmd)
        required: false
        default: bash
        type: string
      checkout:
        description: Checkout repository before running commands
        required: false
        default: "true"
        type: boolean
      fetch-depth:
        description: Checkout fetch-depth (0 for full history)
        required: false
        default: "1"
        type: string
      working-directory:
        description: Working directory to run commands from
        required: false
        default: "."
        type: string
      pre-build:
        description: Commands to run before the build (optional)
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      build:
        description: Build commands to run (required)
        required: true
        type: string
      post-build:
        description: Commands to run after the build (optional)
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      env:
        description: Extra environment variables (KEY=VALUE per line)
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      timeout-minutes:
        description: Job timeout in minutes
        required: false
        default: "60"
        type: string

jobs:
  build:
    name: Custom Build
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runs-on }}
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout-minutes) }}
    env:
      EXTRA_ENV: ${{ inputs.env }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        if: ${{ inputs.checkout }}
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: ${{ inputs.fetch-depth }}

      - name: Export extra env vars
        if: ${{ inputs.env != '' }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working-directory }}
        run: |
          set -e
          while IFS= read -r line; do
            [ -z "$line" ] && continue
            case "$line" in
              \#*) continue ;;
            esac
            printf '%s\n' "$line" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
          done <<'EOF'
          ${{ inputs.env }}
          EOF

      - name: Pre-build commands
        if: ${{ inputs.pre-build != '' }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working-directory }}
        run: ${{ inputs.pre-build }}

      - name: Build commands
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working-directory }}
        run: ${{ inputs.build }}

      - name: Post-build commands
        if: ${{ inputs.post-build != '' }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working-directory }}
        run: ${{ inputs.post-build }}
